title: Cameron Hall Server Pack
description: This is the official pack for the Cameron Hall server at UWA.
body:
This is the official pack for the Cameron Hall factions server at UWA.

This contains Simple Voice Chat for proximity audio, Sodium and Iris for performance and shaders (replacement for OptiFine), and Spark for performance profiling.

This is in combination with server-side plugins to run the Factions aspect of the server.

This pack is not required to join the server, but is recommended for the full experience.

For questions or support, please visit one of the clubs' discord, UCC's discord is [here.](https://ucc.asn.au/discord)
